headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and card headers. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, UI labels, and data tables. Excellent legibility for small text.

primary.description: Teal-600. Use for primary actions, active states, and brand identity.

secondary.description: Orange-500. Use for 'Urgent' actions, promotions, and high-contrast CTAs.

rules: Never center text by default on landing pages.
Overlap elements using negative margins (-mt-12) to break the grid.
Use white cards with subtle borders (border-slate-200).
Dense data tables with Public Sans font.
No gradients on data surfaces, only on summary widgets.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-teal-600 to-emerald-500 text-white shadow-lg shadow-teal-900/20 hover:shadow-teal-900/30 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300 rounded-lg font-semibold tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all duration-200 rounded-lg font-medium

cards.feature: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-xl shadow-slate-200/50 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-teal-100 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden
cards.product: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-slate-200/50 transition-all duration-300 group
cards.stat: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-teal-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-500/20 rounded-lg h-11 transition-all

visual_enhancers.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

assets.icons: Use lucide-react. Preferred icons: Activity, ShieldCheck, Sprout, Beaker, Truck, Users.

principles: Stagger children animations for lists (0.05s delay).
Use spring physics for interactions (stiffness: 300, damping: 30).
Page transitions: Opacity fade + slight Y-axis slide (10px).

accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels if no text is present.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run 'npm install framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge' if not present.
2. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts imports to index.css immediately.
3. THEME: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors defined in this JSON.
4. LAYOUT: Implement the 'Tetris Grid' for the Landing Page using CSS Grid.
5. COMPONENTS: Build a reusable 'ProductCard' and 'StatCard' first.
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, inputs, and links (e.g., data-testid='login-btn').
7. DO NOT use default HTML select/date inputs. Use Shadcn/Radix primitives.
8. BILINGUAL: Prepare all text strings to be wrapped in a translation function (mock it for now).
universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-12 instead of p-4).
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 (#0F172A).
Glassmorphism requires backdrop-blur-xl, not just opacity.
